name: Minestrone a La Moosewood
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked peas or garbanzo beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup kettle, sauté garlic and onions in olive oil until soft and translucent.
2. Add salt, carrot, celery, and eggplant/zucchini (if using, add it with the green pepper). Mix well.
3. Stir in oregano, black pepper, stock, puree, cooked beans, and wine. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and remaining salt. Keep on the lowest heat until about 10 minutes before serving.
5. Heat the soup to a boil, then add pasta and cook gently until the pasta is tender.
6. Serve immediately, garnished with parsley and Parmesan cheese.
